# Seattle Sensitive Dogs

> Private, force-free dog walking for fearful, reactive, and sensitive dogs in North Seattle. Owner-operated by Lily — every walk is walked by her, never a contractor. The whole method is calm, nervous-system-attuned guidance that keeps each dog inside their window of tolerance so trust can build at the dog's own pace.

## What makes this different from other Seattle dog walkers

- **Specialized, not general.** This is not a Rover/Wag-style marketplace or a multi-walker company. It is one experienced walker who works only with fearful, reactive, anxious, and sensitive dogs — the dogs other walkers often give up on.
- **Same walker every time.** The same person (Lily) walks your dog on every visit, because consistency is how sensitive dogs learn to trust.
- **Force-free, always.** No prong collars, shock collars, leash corrections, or flooding. Ever.
- **A written note after every walk**, with photos, behavioral observations, what was practiced, how the dog regulated, and a route map.
- **Weekly partnerships only** (minimum 2 walks per week). No one-off or occasional walks, because a single visit does not help a fearful dog make progress — rhythm and repetition do.
- **Solo walks only.** Never group or pack walks.

## Who it is for

Owners of shy, anxious, fearful, reactive, or misunderstood dogs in North Seattle who want a knowledgeable, patient walker and a long-term relationship, not a transaction.

## Service area

North Seattle neighborhoods: Maple Leaf, Roosevelt, Wedgwood, Ravenna, Fremont, and Wallingford (near ZIP 98115).

## Services and pricing

- **Mellow Meet-and-Greet — $35.** A 30-minute, in-home, no-commitment first meeting where the dog sets the pace.
- **Weekly Walk Partnerships.** Ongoing weekly walks (2+ per week). (Exact per-walk pricing is being finalized.)

## Credentials — stated transparently

Seattle Sensitive Dogs is an owner-operated business with 10+ years of hands-on experience with fearful and reactive dogs. The owner is actively pursuing force-free training certification and pet first aid / CPR certification. The business is **not yet licensed, bonded, or insured** — this is stated openly, with those items in progress. References are available on request.

## Contact

- Text (fastest): 206-657-7315
- Email: info@seattlesensitivedogs.com
- Website: https://seattlesensitivedogs.com/
- Booking starts with the $35 Mellow Meet-and-Greet.

## Voice and values

Gently warm, calmly authoritative, radically honest. The brand promise is: "Trust builds at their pace." The approach centers safety, connection, and continued development for each dog.
